title: Der Junge dem die Welt gehört
original_title: Der Junge, dem die Welt gehört
overview: Basilio lives in an abandoned villa in Sicily with his mysterious elderly mentor Casimir who is to help him find true poetry. In this villa, he tries to translate the symbols of his inner world into music. One day, Basilio meets equally strange Karla whose life already seems mysteriously intertwined with his. The symbolism of the world around them leads to an unexpected discovery.

trailers.title: DER JUNGE DEM DIE WELT GEHÖRT | TRAILER 1 | 2024
